channel.title: ElevenLabs Blog
channel.description: Voice AI, text-to-speech, and product updates from ElevenLabs

item.title: ElevenLabs expands presence in Australia and New Zealand
item.description: ElevenLabs already serves 750,000 users across the region. Now it is tripling its local team, adding sales specialists and forward-deployed engineers.

item.title: ElevenLabs crosses $500M ARR and welcomes new investors
item.description: New investors include institutions like BlackRock and Wellington, enterprises like NVIDIA and Santander, and actors like Jamie Foxx and Eva Longoria.

item.title: ElevenMusic: discover, remix, create, and earn from music
item.description: The AI-powered platform for music discovery and creation, built on top of the ElevenLabs fully licensed music model.

item.title: ElevenLabs is opening a Madrid office and expanding in Spain
item.description: The company will hire into local sales and engineering teams to work closely with Spanish companies as they deploy AI.

item.title: Enterprise voice AI, deployed locally
item.description: ElevenLabs can now be deployed on-premise and on-device. This expands our deployment options beyond cloud and VPC, to cover the full range of enterprise environments.

item.title: Scaling multilingual diplomacy during the Polish presidency of the Council of the EU
item.description: How the Polish Presidency used ElevenLabs to dub ministerial meetings at scale.

item.title: Eric Dane's Legacy at SXSW: Advancing 1 Million Voices
item.description: This year at SXSW, actor Rebecca Gayheart Dane joins ElevenLabs to honor Eric’s legacy and continue the advocacy work he cared so deeply about.

item.title: ElevenLabs and Bookwire sign publishing partnership
item.description: ElevenLabs and Bookwire to make a wide catalog of ebooks available in high-quality audio in over a dozen languages in the ElevenReader app

item.title: Klarna reduces Time to Resolution by 10X with ElevenAgents
item.description: Klarna cut resolution times 10x for 35M US customers using ElevenLabs' voice AI as first-line phone support.

item.title: Introducing ElevenLabs for Government
item.description: Introducing ElevenLabs for Government

item.title: ElevenLabs raises $500M Series D at $11B valuation
item.description: We are doubling down on ElevenAgents and conversational voice models to transform how we interact with technology

item.title: Eleven v3 is Now Generally Available
item.description: Eleven v3 is Now Generally Available

item.title: ElevenLabs is an official partner of Audi Revolut F1 Team
item.description: We’re exploring how our technology can support the team at the track while also transforming how fans around the world experience and connect with the sport.

item.title: Revolut selects ElevenLabs Agents to bolster customer support
item.description: Reducing time to ticket resolution by 8x with multilingual conversational agents.

item.title: Introducing The Eleven Album: A landmark musical release
item.description: Created in collaboration with world-class artists and Eleven Music, our model for generating fully original, studio-quality compositions.

item.title: MasterClass brings AI instructors to life with ElevenLabs
item.description: 75% of users prefer voice interactions with MasterClass On Call

item.title: Deutsche Telekom and ElevenLabs announce partnership
item.description: Bringing ElevenLabs' AI voice agents to the customer service of Europe’s largest Telco (via app and phone).

item.title: Introducing Scribe v2
item.description: Introducing Scribe v2

item.title: ElevenLabs — Freedom Forever cuts customer support costs by 90% using ElevenLabs Agents
item.description: Freedom Forever migrated its inbound support operations to ElevenLabs Agents, reducing cost per call by 90% and human agent headcount by 50%, while delivering zero hold times and a significant drop in call abandonment rates.

item.title: Toyota engages fans with AI-powered Brock Purdy experience
item.description: Driving deeper engagement with nearly 2 minutes of average interaction time per user

item.title: TVS Motor Company deploys multimodal AI agents using ElevenLabs
item.description: TVS Motor Company deploys multimodal AI agents using ElevenLabs

item.title: With Liberty Global we're bringing voice AI to millions of households
item.description: Our commercial partnership also marks the next step in our European expansion

item.title: ElevenLabs — Introducing ElevenLabs Image & Video
item.description: The best audio, image, and video models. Use Veo, Sora, Kling, Wan, Seedance for visuals, then combine with voices, music, and SFX from ElevenLabs.

item.title: Harvey and ElevenLabs Partner to Give Lawyers a Global Voice
item.description: Making legal knowledge more accessible and human across jurisdictions and cultures

item.title: Honoring veterans and their voices: Lt Col Thomas Brittingham’s story
item.description: Honoring veterans and their voices: Lt Col Thomas Brittingham’s story

item.title: Sir Michael Caine joins ElevenLabs' new Iconic Marketplace
item.description: Sir Michael Caine joins ElevenLabs' new Iconic Marketplace

item.title: Introducing Scribe v2 Realtime
item.description: Introducing Scribe v2 Realtime

item.title: ElevenLabs welcomes Matthew McConaughey as a new investor
item.description: ElevenLabs welcomes Matthew McConaughey as a new investor

item.title: Building the First Agentic Government with Ukraine
item.description: We're partnering with Ukraine's Ministry of Digital Transformation to make public services work by voice for everyone with AI

item.title: ElevenLabs UI: Open-source agent components for the web
item.description: ElevenLabs UI is a component library and custom registry built on top of shadcn/ui to help you build multimodal agents faster.

item.title: ElevenLabs - Workflows, our visual conversation flow editor.
item.description: Agent Workflows let you handle complex scenarios by routing to specialized Subagents and, when needed, transferring to human operators.

item.title: Immobiliare.it builds conversational real estate agent in days using ElevenLabs
item.description: Immobiliare.it builds conversational real estate agent in days using ElevenLabs

item.title: Ukrainian Public Services Will Speak Through AI: Announcing a Partnership with ElevenLabs
item.description: Ukraine adds voice to key public services

item.title: Traba deploys AI interview agents to scale industrial staffing
item.description: Over 250,000 interviews automated leveraging ElevenLabs Agents

item.title: Voice AI for India Scale - Scaling Engagement & Storytelling
item.description: Marking a year of rapid development from India’s top enterprises, startups, and creators scaling customer engagement and storytelling

item.title: ElevenLabs — ElevenLabs scales UK and US presence
item.description: ElevenLabs is building local talent hubs and infrastructure to deliver real-time AI audio for enterprises globally

item.title: Expanding into Brazil - ElevenLabs Launches Iconic Partnership with Fábio Porchat
item.description: Launching our first campaign in Brazil with iconic AI voice

item.title: ElevenLabs — Introducing ElevenLabs Agents
item.description: We’re renaming Conversational AI to ElevenLabs Agents, a better reflection of our complete platform for launching conversational agents that talk, type and take action across phone, web and apps.

item.title: Eleven Music is here
item.description: Studio-grade music generated with natural language prompts in any style and for countless uses

item.title: ElevenLabs powers voice for Cisco’s Webex AI Agent
item.description: We're thrilled that ElevenLabs is now powering the voice technology behind the Webex AI Agent

item.title: Eleven v3: Most Expressive AI TTS Model Launched
item.description: Eleven v3 (alpha) introduces advanced audio tags, dialogue mode, and 70+ languages for nuanced, emotionally rich AI-generated speech.

item.title: ElevenLabs establishes Japanese Subsidiary, ElevenLabs G.K.
item.description: Global AI voice technology leader expands to Asia-Pacific region, launching international hub in Japan

item.title: Deutsche Telekom and ElevenLabs Announce Strategic Partnership to Power AI-Driven Podcasting in Magenta App
item.description: Bringing AI-powered audio experiences to millions of users

item.title: ElevenLabs AI voices helping train 911 dispatchers
item.description: ElevenLabs AI voices are helping ThisGen.ai train 911 emergency dispatchers to handle a range of calls and scenarios.
